author: John Kanell
description: These Air Fryer Sweet Potato Fries are crispy on the outside, tender on the inside, and incredibly easy to make. Perfect as a quick snack or simple side dish, they're lightly seasoned and ready in under 25 minutes.
instructions: Peel the sweet potatoes if desired. Cut them in half lengthwise, then cut into 1/4-inch-thick planks and slice into 1/4-inch-thick sticks.
Place the sweet potato sticks in a large bowl and toss with olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika until evenly coated.
Preheat the air fryer to 375°F. Add the sweet potatoes to the basket and air fry for 6 minutes, then gently shake the basket to stir.
Increase the temperature to 400°F and continue air frying for an additional 8 minutes, until tender and crispy.
Season with additional salt and pepper to taste and serve immediately.
notes: You can peel the sweet potatoes or leave the skin on based on preference.
Cut fries evenly so they cook at the same rate.
Do not cut fries thinner than 1/4 inch or they may burn or break apart.
Shake or stir the fries halfway through cooking to promote even crisping.
Try other spices such as cumin, curry powder, or cajun seasoning for variation.
title: Air Fryer Sweet Potato Fries
